title: 帮我入板
name: 帮我入板 maps to add_or_update_board_item
why: This is a stable shorthand for board action, not for general planning.

title: 更新入板
name: 更新入板 maps to add_or_update_board_item
why: The phrase strongly implies updating an existing board entry.

title: 验收
name: 验收 maps to review_acceptance
why: In this workflow, the phrase typically means reviewer-side acceptance check.

title: session-close
name: session-close maps to close_session
why: This is an explicit request to close the current session.

title: 下一条
name: 下一条 maps to move_to_next_item
why: Within board-oriented context, this usually means move to the next active item.

title: 继续
name: 继续 stays conservative in general scenario
why: The phrase is high-frequency but under-specified and should not be overcommitted without context.

title: 提示词
name: 提示词 maps to draft_text_artifact
why: This usually means draft or revise prompt text, not execute implementation.

title: 请帮我更新入板
name: longer overlapping phrase wins for 请帮我更新入板
why: When a longer and shorter shorthand overlap, the longer phrase should win.

title: 请继续评审这个任务
name: explicit reviewer phrase outranks 继续
why: An explicit reviewer-track phrase should outrank the shorter ambiguous phrase `继续`.

title: 继续 with supporting context
name: supporting recent context raises confidence but stays conservative

recent_context: review the next issue after this

why: Recent context may support an existing ambiguous shorthand, but should not remove the need for conservative interpretation.

title: Unknown shorthand
name: unknown input returns unknown intent
why: The interpreter should not invent a workflow hint when no explicit shorthand rule matches.
